text: Two people ride elephants into a pool of water for a watching crowd.
A woman holding two pieces of rolling luggage.
A room with two beds, a dresser drawer and flat screen TV.

Two antelope standing in snow in front of a thicket of tall grass.
A person using cross country skis at a park.
Something is certainly mesmirizing these two good buddies.
A lizard on a banana tree hanging upside down.
There are pipes going across the street, which is being blocked from traffic.
A woman waiting to board the subway train.
